mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.contract_no as contractNo, t.company_name as companyName, t.our_company_name as ourCompanyName, t.products_name as productName, t.total_number as totalNumber, t.total_amount as totalAmount, IFNULL(t.breach_amount, 0) - IFNULL(t.receive_breach_amount, 0) as noReceiveBreachAmount, t.contract_time as contractTime, t.match_user_id as matchUserId, t.match_user_name as matchUserName, t.dealed_amount as dealedAmount, t.pay_full_time as payFullTime, t.billed_amount as billedAmount, a.real_bill_date as realBillDate, t.business_type as businessType, t.match_credit_flg as matchCreditFlg, t.approve_id as approveId, t.dept_id as deptId FROM t_ctr_contract t LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_apply a ON a.ctr_contract_id = t.id
WHERE t.seal_flg = TRUE AND t.billed_amount < t.total_amount AND t.contract_type = 'B' AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND t.enterprise_id = 44
left JOIN t_ctr_contract_rela r ON t.id = r.sell_contract_id left JOIN t_ctr_contract b ON r.buy_contract_id = b.id WHERE b.billed_amount >= b.total_amount AND t.billed_amount < t.total_amount AND t.contract_type = 'S' AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND t.enterprise_id = 44
left JOIN t_ctr_contract_rela r ON t.id = r.sell_contract_id left JOIN t_ctr_contract b ON r.buy_contract_id = b.id WHERE b.billed_amount < b.total_amount
AND t.billed_amount >= t.total_amount AND t.contract_type = 'S' AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND t.enterprise_id = 44
WHERE t.seal_flg = TRUE AND t.billed_amount < t.total_amount AND t.contract_type = 'S' AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND t.enterprise_id = 44
WHERE t.seal_flg = TRUE AND t.dealed_amount < t.total_amount AND t.contract_type = 'B' AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND t.match_credit_flg = TRUE AND t.enterprise_id = 44
WHERE t.seal_flg = true AND t.dealed_amount < t.total_amount AND t.contract_type = 'B' AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND t.match_credit_flg = FALSE AND t.enterprise_id = 44
left JOIN t_ctr_contract_rela r ON t.id = r.sell_contract_id left JOIN t_ctr_contract b ON r.buy_contract_id = b.id WHERE b.dealed_amount >= b.total_amount AND t.dealed_amount < t.total_amount AND t.warehouse_number < t.total_number AND t.contract_type = 'S' AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND t.enterprise_id = 44 AND t.match_credit_flg = true
WHERE t.enterprise_id = 44 AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND t.status = 'D' AND t.seal_flg = FALSE
WHERE t.enterprise_id = 44 AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND t.seal_flg = TRUE AND t.total_number > t.warehouse_number
WHERE t.enterprise_id = 44 AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND t.seal_flg = TRUE AND t.total_number > t.warehouse_number
WHERE t.enterprise_id = 44 AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND t.seal_flg = TRUE AND t.warehouse_number >= t.total_number AND t.confirm_receipt_flg = FALSE
WHERE t.enterprise_id = 44 AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND t.seal_flg = TRUE AND t.total_amount > t.dealed_amount
WHERE t.enterprise_id = 44 AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND t.seal_flg = TRUE AND t.total_amount > t.dealed_amount
WHERE t.enterprise_id = 44 AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND t.seal_flg = TRUE AND t.warehouse_number = t.total_number AND t.total_amount > t.billed_amount
WHERE t.enterprise_id = 44 AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND t.seal_flg = TRUE AND t.warehouse_number = t.total_number AND t.total_amount > t.billed_amount
WHERE t.enterprise_id = 44 AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND t.seal_flg = TRUE AND t.dealed_amount = t.total_amount AND t.billed_amount = t.total_amount AND t.warehouse_number = t.total_number AND t.breach_amount = t.receive_breach_amount
WHERE t.enterprise_id = 44 AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB'
WHERE t.enterprise_id = 44 AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND t.seal_flg = TRUE AND t.breach_amount > t.receive_breach_amount
where 1=1
AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND t.enterprise_id = 44 AND t.match_credit_flg = TRUE
AND t.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND t.enterprise_id = 44 AND t.match_credit_flg = FALSE
AND t.contract_status <> 'C'
AND t.contract_status = 'C'
and t.contract_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{contractNo},'%')
and t.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{companyName},'%')
and t.our_company_name in
#{ourCompanyNames[${index}]}
and t.contract_type = #{contractType}
AND DATE_FORMAT(t.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeBegin}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(t.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#{contractTimeEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d'),INTERVAL 1 DAY)
and t.match_user_id not in
#{hgMatchUserIdList[${index}]}
and t.match_user_id in
#{hgMatchUserIdList[${index}]}
order by t.id desc
